title: MCP client configuration (.mcp.json)
description: Derived minimal JSON Schema for the .mcp.json client configuration shape mcp-guard validates. Sourced from the canonical MCP specification at the commit recorded in src/scanners/mcp-schema/upstream-commit.txt; see ADR-0005 for the pin + drift protocol.

mcpServers.description: Map of server identifier to server configuration.

command.description: Executable to invoke for stdio transport.

env.description: Environment variables to inject into the server process.

cwd.description: Working directory override for the server process.

url.description: HTTP or HTTPS endpoint for SSE / streamable-HTTP transport.

headers.description: Static headers attached to every request to the endpoint.
